top_signals.title: Trump says U.S. will hold Iran responsible for Houthi attacks after oil tankers targeted in Red Sea
top_signals.summary: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Laura Loomer meets Zelenskyy after pro-Ukraine conversion
top_signals.summary: Far-right influencer abandoned opposition to war to praise Kyiv’s resilience against Russian aggression
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japanese satellite operator seeks Southeast Asia demand on China tensions
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
top_signals.summary: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan Football Association taps Go Oiwa as next men’s national team coach
top_signals.summary: Moriyasu, 57, who led the Samurai Blue in this year's FIFA World Cup, will stay on until the next Asian Cup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU fines Google $1 billion for search, app store antitrust violations
top_signals.summary: The European Commission fined Google €890 million ($1 billion) on Thursday after finding the company had violated the European Union's Digital Markets Act (DMA), which ensures fair online competition. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
